title: Robot Talk Episode 154 – Visual navigation in insects and robots, with Andrew Philippides
title_zh: 机器人对话第154期——昆虫与机器人的视觉导航，与Andrew Philippides
abstract: Claire chatted to Andrew Philippides from the University of Sussex about what we can learn from ants and bees to improve robot navigation. Andrew Philippides is a Professor of Biorobotics at the University of Sussex, where he co-directs the Centre for Computational Neuroscience and Robotics and the be.AI Leverhulme Doctoral centre for Biomimetic Embodied AI. […]
abstract_zh: Claire与苏塞克斯大学的Andrew Philippides讨论了如何从蚂蚁和蜜蜂身上学习以改进机器人导航。Andrew Philippides是苏塞克斯大学的仿生机器人学教授，他共同领导计算神经科学与机器人学中心以及be.AI Leverhulme仿生具身AI博士中心。
tldr_zh: 探讨从昆虫视觉导航中学习以改进机器人导航。
cover_zh: 蚂蚁蜜蜂的导航秘诀？机器人也能学会！

score_breakdown.label: 关键词命中密集
score_breakdown.hint: 频道关键词命中 1 个（embodied ai）
